title: glochidion multilobum
intro: Glochidion multilobum is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a type of spurge. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Glochidion multilobum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its leaves and roots are typically used for medicinal purposes.
